# Chew

> Chew is a women-owned coffee shop, café and bakery at 76 Church Street, Wynberg, Cape Town. Real coffee, fresh-baked croissants, milkshakes, smoothies and breakfasts. Rated 4.3★ on Google. Open Monday–Friday, 7am–4pm.

## Key facts
- Name: Chew
- Type: Coffee shop / café / bakery (women-owned)
- Address: 76 Church Street, Wynberg, Cape Town, 7800, South Africa
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 7:00am–4:00pm (closed weekends)
- Phone: 084 992 2088 (+27 84 992 2088)
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/chew_wynberg
- Order (delivery/pickup): https://www.ubereats.com/za/store/chew/CxgQ4EXIRkGeoMhEpds4qA
- Google reviews / map: https://share.google/MRBzK8PPvixv3xaPA
- Rating: 4.3 / 5 across 12 Google reviews

## Menu highlights
- Hot drinks: espresso, americano, cappuccino, flat white, latte, mocha, red (rooibos) cappuccino, rooibos & tea, hot chocolate, iced coffee
- Milkshakes & mocktails: strawberry perfection, chocolate bliss, weekly special, ocean lemonade (passionfruit), piña colada (mixed berry)
- Smoothies: berry banana, nutty banana, avo refresher, strawberry sunset
- Bakery & kitchen: fresh-baked croissants, scones, made-to-order sandwiches, breakfasts

## Pages
- [Home](https://chew-wynberg-masterclass.vercel.app/): hero, why Chew, menu, build-your-order, reviews, visit & map, FAQ.
